art_direction: stylized readable fantasy ARPG, pop-deformed, silhouette-first

pivot_defaults.enemy: ground center or hover ground reference

mesh_defaults.uv2: required only for static lightmapped environment/building assets

batch_rule: Generate the full batch first, then regenerate only failed validation assets. Max two micro-fix loops per asset.

source_art_direction_contract.genre_statement: Commercial-safe friendly compact action-adventure built from rounded low folded plates, four-part inlays, chunky broken tabs, saturated readable color planes, and one functional signal-thread language.
